services.title: Services

first.subtitle: Hire great people
first.description: We build A-Player teams for your company
first.fullDescription:
A bad hire is a cost nobody puts on the spreadsheet — but everyone pays. We map the technical and behavioral profile before any search begins, build qualified pipelines, and deliver candidates who don't just fill positions: they raise the bar for the whole team.

We work on a success fee model, helping reduce time-to-hire, bringing more predictability to critical hires, and offering a guarantee during the initial period.

Believe it: the right people are what determine whether a business becomes successful and profitable — or gets swallowed by the market.

The right talent needs to be found, and that's exactly what we do here.

I’m {{linkedinLabel}}, and I’ve spent the last several years leading talent acquisition teams at leading companies. It would be a pleasure to talk with you.

third.subtitle: Recruiting high performers: a training program for hiring managers
third.description: Empower your team with advanced techniques in attraction, screening, and interviewing, making the selection process more agile and efficient
third.fullDescription: Recruiting well is a skill and it can be developed. This training program was designed for managers and HR teams who want to master modern techniques in candidate attraction, screening, and interviewing. We cover everything from crafting job descriptions that attract the right profiles, to competency-based interview techniques and data-driven decision-making aligned with cultural fit. The result is a more agile, consistent, and efficient selection process — one that reduces turnover and raises the quality of your hires. Ideal for companies looking to build a high-performance recruitment culture from within

fifth.subtitle: LinkedIn & CV Review
fifth.description: You are more than your CV — but the market judges what it sees first
fifth.fullDescription:
The market is competitive and the best opportunities are no longer posted on LinkedIn. They circulate directly among recruiters who use powerful tools to identify talent.
We restructure your personal brand to pass ATS filters, rank in LinkedIn searches, and communicate value before the first conversation even happens. Your next opportunity starts with the impression you make before you're even called.

How it works:

Step 1: Deep Dive into your career (1h)
We start with a one-on-one conversation to understand your journey, goals, achievements, and differentiators.

In this stage, we do a deeper analysis of your career to identify:

- Which results deserve the most emphasis
- How the market sees your profile today
- How you want to be perceived
- Possible adjustments to the way you communicate your professional brand

Excellent professionals often struggle to translate their deliverables into a clear, compelling narrative for recruiters and hiring managers. That's exactly what we work on here.

Step 2: Building the materials
After the diagnosis, we handle the full execution.

Includes:

- Complete resume restructuring
- ATS optimization (ranking in the systems companies use)
- Strategic rewriting of your professional experience
- Complete LinkedIn overhaul
- Review of headline, summary (About), and keywords
- Alignment for national and international opportunities

The focus is to increase your visibility and ensure your experience is presented in the most strategic way possible.

Step 3: Delivery and final guidance (1h)
When the materials are ready, we hold a closing session.

In it, I present all the changes made and also share practical guidance on:

- Networking
- Strategic use of LinkedIn
- Professional positioning
- Next steps in your search
- Final questions and adjustments

The idea is that you don't just receive updated materials, but understand how to use them to generate more opportunities.

I'm {{linkedinLabel}}, I've worked at leading companies, led talent acquisition teams, and today I work globally selecting talent on an international scale.
fifth.callout: Schedule a time directly with me

sixth.subtitle: Mentoring and interview preparation
sixth.description: The ideal role is not won by luck, it is earned through preparation.
sixth.fullDescription:
We help you develop a clear and compelling professional narrative, simulate real interview scenarios with precise feedback, and teach techniques that transform nervousness into confidence and executive presence.Our goal is simple: When you walk into the interview, you know exactly who you are, what you bring, and why you are the right person for the role.

How it works:
We'll work with scorecards (interview script for the position)

- Frequently asked questions;
- Posture and language
- Executive communication

In addition, it's a moment to ask questions, raise topics, and share best practices

Investment: $ 50,00/hour

history.first: Nevada Consulting began its operations in 2020, responding to the need of companies seeking an impartial and specialized perspective in Human Resources.
history.second: The unique satisfaction of providing support to organizations, bringing a valuable external perspective, was the catalyst for the start of our journey.
history.third: As we delivered positive results, the demand for our services progressively increased. This brought us new challenges and motivated us to expand our scope of action, ranging from cultural transformations to the development of leadership and teams.
history.fourth: The core of our mission is to help companies maximize the potential of their most valuable resource: human capital. It was based on this philosophy that Nevada Consulting was established, grounded in the belief that people are fundamental to the success of any organization.

description.subtitle: Senior Consultant
description.quote: High-performance teams don't happen by chance. They are built with intention.
description.first: People and culture consultant, specialized in forming efficient teams.
description.second: Graduated in Psychology from the Federal University of Minas Gerais, with an MBA in Business Management from USP. I have a strong interest in human behavior within organizational dynamics and strategy.
description.third: As a leader in talent attraction, selection, and onboarding, I manage the end-to-end journey of building high-performance teams, ensuring an exceptional experience for both candidates and hiring managers. I also lead initiatives focused on engagement, diversity and inclusion, and organizational development, working closely with business units to drive growth and performance.
description.fourth: Driven by curiosity, I explore self-management, agility, and metrics to support organizations in evolving and expanding their awareness — enabling them to become more strategic, transparent, and equitable.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.firstReview1: I had the opportunity to work with Juliana Carvalho at Red Ventures Brazil and Okto Brazil, and I always achieved excellent results in her recruitments.
testimonials.firstReview2: Juliana is a highly qualified professional, with a great ability to quickly absorb the requirements of each position. Additionally, her ability to understand the cultural aspects of companies allows her to deliver professionals who are not only technically aligned but also adherent to the organizational culture.
testimonials.firstReview3: Her assertiveness and precision in conducting selection processes make her an excellent partner for any company seeking high-level talent.
testimonials.secondReview1: The best investment I made to get a head start on taking care of my career!
testimonials.secondReview2: And Ju was excellent in conducting conversations with me, understanding me as a professional and exactly what I wanted to achieve and convey with my CV/LinkedIn! It became extremely strategic, conveying exactly what I wanted, and with the profile adjusted, I received more than 5 contacts from interested recruiters within a month.
testimonials.secondReview3: In addition to doing all this, she was (and is) always available on WhatsApp to guide me and answer questions! Excellent professional, competent, and concerned with understanding what you really want to be assertive in delivery! I recommend 100%.
testimonials.thirdReview1: Juliana did exceptional work in recruitment consulting for Komuh, her strategic approach was fundamental in optimizing our entire selection process
testimonials.thirdReview2: From the beginning, she was fully aligned with our culture and needs, and it was a concern of hers from the start of the process, ensuring that each candidate presented not only had the technical skills but also the right fit with the team and agency.
testimonials.thirdReview3: The quality of the selected professionals and the speed in filling the positions positively impacted our operation. The results exceeded all our expectations!

diferenciais.title: Why companies choose us?
negative: Processes that take months with no estimated timeline
No guarantee if the professional doesn't stay
Cultural fit ignored during the selection process
Junior analysts running the entire process from start to finish
positive: Approved candidates sent within 5 business days
Success fee model — you only pay after hiring
Only 3 pre-validated finalists, with a report
Cultural fit as a decision criterion
Selection process with executive evaluation by Juliana

juliana.subtitle: Psychologist, MBA USP, University of Akron (Ohio, USA), +10 years in senior recruitment
juliana.bio: I led talent acquisition at reference companies before founding Nevada. Today I work with few clients by choice: the boutique model exists precisely so that each process is personally conducted, from the first briefing to the final interview.

items.q: How long does it take on average to fill a role?
items.a: We send approved profiles within 5 business days. The average time-to-hire is 30 days — the detailed timeline is defined with you during the job briefing.

items.q: What if the hired professional doesn't work out in the first months?
items.a: Nevada offers replacement: if the hired professional does not stay for the first 90 days for fit-related reasons, the role is reopened at no additional cost. Terms are defined in the contract before work begins.

items.q: How does payment work and what is the average fee?
items.a: The model is success-based: payment happens only after the actual hire. There is no monthly fee or upfront retainer. The amount is proportional to the role's salary, within market range for boutiques specializing in senior recruitment, and is detailed in the initial briefing.

items.q: In which areas and seniority levels does Nevada operate?
items.a: Engineering (back-end, front-end, full-stack, mobile, DevOps, data, machine learning), product and design (PM, GPM, CPO, UI/UX), technical leadership (CTO, VPs, Engineering Managers) and C-level positions in other areas (marketing, agencies, sales). Focus on mid-to-senior level: senior, staff, and leadership roles. Nevada does not work with junior positions or high-volume recruitment.

Operations are remote and serve companies throughout Brazil, with concentration in the Southeast (São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, Belo Horizonte). Since most clients operate in remote or hybrid mode, the company's location matters less than the location of available candidates for the role.
